summary_one_line: Profile PCS-signature field must hold a non-Lab FOURCC so cmsGetPCS()==cmsSigLabData fails and the false branch executes.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte profile-header signature field driving cmsGetPCS (around offsets 0x10-0x13, the colorspace/PCS FOURCC) must equal a non-Lab signature value (e.g. 'Lab ' replaced by 'XYZ'/'MCH7'/'MCHC'/'3CLR'-style FOURCCs), so the equality comparison cmsGetPCS(hProfile)==cmsSigLabData evaluates false; the loser keeps the Lab-matching FOURCC and is pinned on the true side.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving vpc seed carries a varied, non-uniform FOURCC at offsets 0x10-0x13 ('Lab ', 'MCH7', 'MCHC', '3CLR') and reaches the blocker's false side (line 775 W shows T=9 F=10), evidence the PCS comparand was driven off the Lab literal.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser-blocking value_profile seeds hold the identical uniform bytes 52 47 42 20 ('RGB ') at 0x10-0x13 and PCS resolves to Lab, so they always take the true side (line 775 L shows T=20 F=0) and never resolve the false branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile: the CmpLogObserver records the runtime operands of cmsGetPCS()==cmsSigLabData, and I2SRandReplace splices the logged comparand into the input FOURCC bytes, flipping the equality off Lab in one mutation. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets a CMP_MAP Hamming bucket, which cannot synthesize the exact 4-byte substitution to clear the gate.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the false branch of an exact equality comparison on the profile PCS signature.
Globally blocked side is the false branch.
Winner-resolving seeds carry varied non-Lab FOURCC bytes at the colorspace/PCS field offsets 0x10-0x13.
Loser-blocking seeds hold a uniform RGB FOURCC at 0x10-0x13.
A winner seed at offset 0x10-0x13 holds the Lab FOURCC variant 'Lab ' distinct from the loser pin.
At the blocker line 775 the winner explores the false side (F=10) while the loser never does (F=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 775  T=9 F=10  T=20 F=0  if (cmsGetPCS(hProfile) == cmsSigLabData)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog has I2SRandReplace plus a per-execution CMP buffer; value_profile has neither.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only writes coarse CMP_MAP distance buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2183 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 18b267ad30349d2b` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 12 of the 13-level ancestor chain, the ParentInfo-only signature of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating a non-equality predicate (e.g. PCS != Lab) or a comparand with no input-byte pre-image where value_profile_cmplog shows no advantage over value_profile, or value_profile resolving the false branch as fast as vpc, would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact source byte offset of the PCS FOURCC is inferred from the colorspace-style field at 0x10-0x13 rather than confirmed against the lcms header parser, since cmsGetPCS reads the PCS slot which may sit at a different header offset than the device colorspace shown in the dump.
